chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2598 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ شِمْرٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ : رَأَيْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ عَلَيْهِ بُرْدٌ مُخَفَّفٌ وَ هُوَ مُحْرِمٌ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2598 - It was narrated from Amr ibn Shimmar, from his father, who said:
"I saw Abu Ja'far (as) wearing a lightweight striped cloak (burd mukhaffaf) while he was in the state of Ihram."
